shortDescription: As a Founding Member of CartCo Tech, I help drive the company’s product direction, business strategy, market positioning, and early-stage growth for a quick commerce platform in India. I also lead the development and deployment of its multi-app ecosystem across customer, vendor, delivery, and admin workflows, turning business needs into scalable production-ready products.

As a full-stack software developer, desgined and built scalable web applications and optimized deployment processes for ASU. Mentored junior developers and collaborated with clients to deliver efficient software solutions​.

Built the S-Clinical website. Designed and implemented a Clinical Trial Management System, integrating real-time updates, approval workflows, and secure data storage to improve trial management efficiency and accuracy.

Developed a patient portal, enabling remote consultations and easy access to prescriptions and medical reports. Implemented a video calling interface for real-time doctor-patient communication, integrating reports and prescriptions into the UI​.
